response.overview: In Beefy Builders, it's another hard day on the job with the men of Alphamales. New recruits Justin and Jessy get down to it, ruining their overalls as they rip them apart for a taste of hot hairy ass. Meanwhile, Marcus and Gio make themselves even later for the office by getting distracted with their muscled bodies, hairy chests, big Latino dicks and hungry holes! Handsome cover star Jessy Ares adds some hot American flavor to the British mix with his dark brooding looks and hairy muscled body - he's the perfect addition to the Alphamales family!
response.title: Beefy Builders
